odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
    
      

        Le Refuge — Planning
        
        
        (function(){try{var k='refuge-theme',t=localStorage.getItem(k);if(!t){t=(window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches)?'dark':'light';}document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',t);}catch(e){}})();
        
          var odoo = ;
          odoo.loadMenusPromise = Promise.resolve();
